title: Device Forensics: pfSense — Live CLI
description: pfsense-edge-01 had its WebGUI exposed on WAN with a guessable admin password. Reconstruct the brute force, the rogue admin, and the NAT rule that opened internal SSH to the world.

hints.text: `connect pfsense-edge-01`. Start with `show users` to spot the third user. `show auth-log | include authenticated successfully` pins the source IP.
pfSense's /conf/config.xml carries everything. `show config | begin <nat>` jumps to the NAT block. `show nat` gives the resolved pfctl view.
